items.title: [正面] The AI translation doesn't affect the game in my o...
items.summary: The AI translation doesn't affect the game in my opinion and it's been really enjoyable and addictive so far. The character designs are nice, the game mechanics are fun but some require trial and error to get a good team balance. A very decent gacha type game. It does have quite a few similarities with R1999.
